description: Style NoteThe Aztek Sports shoe is a classic that looks every bit the typical sports shoe. Mesh and synthetic upper with a comfy inner, this adidas shoe is a closet essential!Product DetailsWhite synthetic upper with mesh inlaysHas central lace-ups, mesh tongue and padded innerThick foamy rubber midsoleTerraced TPU outsole with a decoupled heel and grooves at the peripheryMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshRemove dirt with a clean cloth
